Everything your pet needs

From daily reminders to lab analysis — PetAI covers it all.

Health Score

Real-time AI score based on all your pet's data

AI Health Assistant

Ask anything — get instant, personalized answers

Lab Analysis

Upload bloodwork, get plain-English AI explanations

Smart Reminders

Never miss a vaccine, medication, or checkup again

Breeding Suite

Heat tracker, whelping guide, COI calculator, mating match

Voice AI

Understand your pet's barks and vocalizations in real time

Vet Reports

All visit records in one place with AI summaries

Health Timeline

Complete medical history with trend analysis

Marketplace

Verified breeders, pedigrees, breed picker quiz

Simple pricing

Start free. Pay only when you want more.

Free

$0

To get started

  • 1 pet profile
  • Health card & reminders
  • Heat cycle tracker
  • Health Score (basic)
  • AI chat (5 questions/day)
Popular

Pro

$4.99

/mo

For caring pet owners

  • Up to 5 pets
  • AI lab analysis (PDF upload)
  • Unlimited AI chat
  • Voice analysis (smart collar)
  • Detailed health score + trends
  • Export vet reports

Breeder

$9.99

/mo

For professional breeders

  • Everything in Pro
  • COI calculator
  • Auto breeding contract (e-sign)
  • Marketplace listings
  • Pedigree-based mate matching
  • AI name generator
  • Priority support

+ 20% commission on consultations · 3% on marketplace deals · Breeding contract: $4.90
